column1: #Instructions for RainbowCSV:
# 1: Comment fix: Select the "#" character
column2: right click->Rainbow CSV->Set selection as Comment Prefix

column1: # 2: Line generation: Generate your CSV lines and paste them; mass-fix the columns if needed using the alt+shift+click multi-row select feature
# 3: Order and sum:
# 3.1: Convert to minutes: IF there are estimations/remTimes in "h" => convert them to m(inutes)
# 3.2: Prepare to sum: Remove the "m" after all the time values (both Estimation and RemTime): alt+shitf+click select all in the column
column3: switch on the "in selection" (three horizontal lines"
column6: press Replace all

column1: # 3.3: Open the query window: Press 'Query' (next to CSVLint button in the bottom)
# 3.4: Order: Put "SELECT * ORDER BY a3
column3: press run then copy the result back to this one

column1: # 3.5: Sum: Queries are "SELECT sum(a2)" for sum of Estimation and "SELECT sum(a5)" for sum of RemTime; Run each and put the results as a new line like the example below
